hooks.command: test -f "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/scripts/ai-metrics-record.mjs" && node "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/scripts/ai-metrics-record.mjs" --hook-event PostToolUse --event-kind file_change --non-blocking >/dev/null 2>&1 || true # agent-spectrum-kernel:claude-adapter-hook

test -f "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/scripts/ai-metrics-record.mjs" && node "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/scripts/ai-metrics-record.mjs" --hook-event PostToolUse --event-kind file_change --non-blocking >/dev/null 2>&1 || true # agent-spectrum-kernel:claude-adapter-hook

test -f "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/scripts/ai-metrics-record.mjs" && node "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/scripts/ai-metrics-record.mjs" --hook-event PostToolUse --event-kind file_change --non-blocking >/dev/null 2>&1 || true # agent-spectrum-kernel:claude-adapter-hook

test -f "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/scripts/ai-metrics-record.mjs" && node "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/scripts/ai-metrics-record.mjs" --hook-event PostToolUse --event-kind verification_attempt --non-blocking >/dev/null 2>&1 || true # agent-spectrum-kernel:claude-adapter-hook

test -f "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/scripts/ai-metrics-record.mjs" && node "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/scripts/ai-metrics-record.mjs" --hook-event Stop --event-kind task_stop --sidecar "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/metrics/current-task.json" --non-blocking >/dev/null 2>&1 || true # agent-spectrum-kernel:claude-adapter-hook
